'''galapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:practicum|practicum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-l-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:practicum|practicum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| galapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gælæpæth|gælæpæth]] || [[word:gælæpæj|gælæpæj]] || [[word:gælæpæsh|gælæpæsh]] || [[word:gælæpæ|gælæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:galalapath|galalapath]] || [[word:galalapaj|galalapaj]] || [[word:galalapash|galalapash]] || [[word:galalapa|galalapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:galapath|galapath]] || [[word:galapaj|galapaj]] || [[word:galapash|galapash]] || [[word:galapa|galapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:galafpath|galafpath]] || [[word:galafpaj|galafpaj]] || [[word:galafpash|galafpash]] || [[word:galafpaf|galafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:galapatha|galapatha]] || [[word:galapaja|galapaja]] || [[word:galapasha|galapasha]] || [[word:galapaka|galapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:galapath|galapath]] || [[word:galapaj|galapaj]] || [[word:galapash|galapash]] || [[word:galapa|galapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:galapathal|galapathal]] || [[word:galapajal|galapajal]] || [[word:galapashal|galapashal]] || [[word:galapakal|galapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:galapathatha|galapathatha]] || [[word:galapajaja|galapajaja]] || [[word:galapashasha|galapashasha]] || [[word:galapaka|galapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:galapathan|galapathan]] || [[word:galapajan|galapajan]] || [[word:galapashan|galapashan]] || [[word:galapakan|galapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:galapathaoro|galapathaoro]] || [[word:galapajaoro|galapajaoro]] || [[word:galapashaoro|galapashaoro]] || [[word:galapakaoro|galapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
